title: silene viscosa
intro: Silene viscosa, also known as sticky catchfly or sticky silene, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. Silene viscosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
